commands.review_summary:
The PR resolves `/btw` to the canonical runtime model before auth/profile and fallback decisions, reselects the Codex-capable harness for canonical `openai/gpt-5.5`, and adds regression coverage for legacy `openai-codex` route state.

PR surface: Source +25, Tests +59. Total +84 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main selects the `/btw` harness from stale provider state before canonical runtime model resolution and can continue toward direct provider fallback. I did not run a live Telegram/Codex OAuth flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This PR needs contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the compatibility/auth-provider routing change; there is no narrow automated repair to request from ClawSweeper.
